sheets.title: Sheet1
rows: International Symposium: Medically Assisted Dying: Global Trends and Asian Perspectives
ACR = Academic Conference Room, 11/F, Cheng Yu Tung Tower, Centennial Campus, HKU
Duties of Serene, Jane and (helper) Yan

a. Sharing of Y's phone no. and email address with S? 
b. Sharing Zoom link with Y
c. Inform Y of the location of the slides and recordings
Meet speaker at 8:00 am on 1/F of Hotel Jen and walk with them to MTR Exit B2 and then through the station to MTR Exit C2 to ACR and Whatsapp J about the siutation

1. List of non-local speakers
2. Programme booklet, which contains photos
3. a card to be held at the Hotel?
Emergency plan: S will take care of the venue and J will go to the hotel too
IT set up (including the display of the background slide) and show the speakers how to use the equipment before the session

uploaded to the desktop: 
1. MP4 of Prof Chen's video
Put up a poster and seating plan and programme on the wall at the entrance

1. poster 
2. seating plan x2 
3. programme x 2
4. glu-tack/ dispensary tape
Stick a paper "no." notice for each seat

1. number notice from 1 to [x] 
2. dispensary tape
at the beginning, ensure that the event is being recorded
ensure that the event is being recorded on Zoom and that slides and video recordings are shown properly for Zoom participants throughout the event
watch the symposium on phone as a member of the audience to ensure that slides and video recordings are shown properly for Zoom participants throughout the event
ensure that both onsite camcorders are on by watching on Zoom
Put room temp water and snacks on the table at the outset
Signing in and giving lanyards and onsite registration
Show the participant location of his/her seat (if not busy)
Refill Water for water jugs on head table during break and forfor water jugs on  tables in the lobby during break
1. access to pantry on 9/F (water dispenser inside pandry)
1. "1 minute left" card and "Time is u"p card
Play video recording and click maximise quality

uploaded to the desktop: 
1. MP4 of Prof Chen's video
Change name stands at the head table (seat nos. 89-93)
Name stands for all speakers and chairs and Julie Chen

In the morning break, (a) pick up 2 boxes of salad wraps and 2 pots of Coffee and 1 pot of tea at Alfafa  and put them on the table (*two queues for food and drinks) and (b) put cutlery and tissue on table

1. receipts
2. paper notices each showing description of the food or drink

In the afternoon break, (b) pick up 2 boxes of fruit tarts and 2 pots of Coffee and 1 pot of tea at Alfafa  and put them on the table (*two queues for food and drinks) and (b) put cutlery and tissue on table

1. receipts
2. paper notices each showing description of the food or drink
hold a "?" card, accompany speakers to Bijas, the restaurant for lunch (1:40 pm)
Be at Bijas at 1:40 pm to accompany the speakers back to ACR
hold a "?" card, accompany speakers to SCR, the restaurant for dinner
stay in ACR if any equipment is left there and in case anyone leaves any belonging behind? Main entrance of ACR will not be locked
Be the MC, in particular, invite each chair to present a set of metal bookmarks to each speaker at thend of session 1, 2 and 3 and after presentation of Dr Siraj
Give souvenir to chair for presentation to each of the eleven speakers
1. 11 sets of metal bookmarks plus one spare set?
Taking 1 photo for presentation of each souvenir and group photos for each session and for the whole conference and taking photos throughout the symposium
Ensure that the two glass doors and (after ensuring that no one is in the washroom) the wood door are locked
